_readme: Golden retrieval-eval set (MEMORY_REFACTOR_SPEC Stage 0). Each item: a question a user
might ask the reply bot, plus what search() should surface. Run: python tools/eval_retrieval.py
Match semantics: a returned chunk satisfies an item if it matches ANY entry in `expect`.
Within one expect entry, every specified field must match: `source_type` (exact),
at least one substring present in the chunk text).
Optional per-item `date_filter` is passed straight to search() — keep at least one such item
to exercise the day-filtered path (the Stage-1 date-filter fix).
GROW THIS FILE as archived days accrue: add a few questions per interesting day, and add a
true 1-2 character ticker query (Stage-2 tokenizer case) when one first appears in the archive
— the 2026-06-30 day has no 1-2 char tickers, so ALM/AGI/WF6 are the closest exact-token probes.
Note: the WILTW report is indexed TWICE — the Opus summary (source_type 'wiltw') and the raw
PDF (source_type 'pdf', source_name 'Wiltw ...'). Both are correct answers for 13D questions,
Note on 'digest' chunks: the digest summarizes every source, so its chunks are topical matches
for almost any question — but the reply bot loads the day's digest separately as context, so
retrieval surfacing same-day digest chunks adds little. Default to expecting the UNDERLYING
source; only list a digest alternative where a digest-level answer is genuinely sufficient.
(This asymmetry is why the Stage-1 reranker scored nominally lower — it promotes digest chunks.)

questions.question: What is the state of private credit in H1 2026?
What did Strategy announce about its Digital Credit Capital Framework?
Which tungsten miners does 13D recommend on the critical minerals squeeze?
What is the thesis on $ALM Almonty Industries?
What happened at Alamos Gold's Young-Davidson mine and how did the stock react?
What is 13D's highest-conviction portfolio allocation to gold and silver miners?
What was the Moody's rating action on Wynn Resorts?
What new high yield deal did Stifel flash on American Greetings?
What did FSK file about a purchase agreement with KKR?
Were there any insider Form 4 filings in Pagaya?
Why did the Japanese yen fall to a 40-year low?
How did oil perform this quarter?

text_contains_any: Oil Headed for Largest Quarterly Loss

questions.question: What was the Supreme Court ruling about independent agencies and how might it matter for markets?
What is happening to Rotterdam APT tungsten prices and China's tungsten exports?
